question.label: Thread follow
question.name: still unsure what — can you say more about what that means for you right now?
question.description: Runtime thread-follow injected because planner did not follow substantive answer.

answer: I do ask for help sometimes, but I worry about sounding slow.

assessment.note: Worrying that asking for help will make them sound slow signals strong inhibition and disengaging risk around seeking support; also reveals a clarity/trust issue worth probing next. [THREAD-DEFERRED] Concrete thread not followed because drill cap reached at observation stage.

new_queue.name: Is there anything on your mind that we haven't made space to talk about?

new_queue.name: Where do you feel the most pressure to prove yourself right now?

new_queue.label: Support that helps
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would make the biggest difference right now?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
I am still unsure what good really looks like here week to week.
I do ask for help sometimes, but I worry about sounding slow.
